seoTitle: Coondle vs Coorow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coondle and Coorow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coondle and Coorow.
heading: Coondle vs Coorow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coondle, Western Australia and Coorow, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coorow has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Coondle (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coondle or Coorow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coondle has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Coorow scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coondle scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Coorow scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coondle or Coorow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coorow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
